description_long: This is a round wall clock with a light blue frame and a white face. The clock features twelve raised, evenly spaced tick marks in place of numerals, and two thick, dark gray hands indicating the time. The frame is smooth and slightly rounded, giving the clock a modern and clean appearance. The face is flat and unadorned except for the tick marks and hands, with no additional decorations or branding. The back and sides of the clock are solid blue, with no visible mounting hardware or openings. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for a variety of urban environments.
description: A round, blue-framed wall clock with a white face, raised tick marks, and two dark gray hands in a minimalistic style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white clock face, blue frame, raised tick marks, and two dark gray hands.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thickness and solid blue color of the frame, with no visible face details.
description_view_2: Rear or angled view showing the back of the clock, which is plain blue with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the blue frame's thickness and smoothness.
attribute_face_design: Circular white face with raised tick marks and no numerals, enclosed by a blue frame.
